发现元素周期表的全新世界，尽在我们创新的3D应用中！沉浸在全新、视觉上令人惊叹的元素世界中。我们的应用提供极简和引人入胜的体验，使探索元素周期表成为一次独特而引人入胜的旅程。

通过我们直观的界面和极简设计，您可以轻松浏览各个元素。每个元素在引人入胜的3D环境中栩栩如生，让您以前所未有的方式可视化其结构。观察元素如何相互作用，以全新的视角揭示它们的性质。

想要了解特定元素更多吗？我们的应用提供有关每个元素的详细且易于理解的信息，涵盖从其物理和化学性质到历史和实际用途的所有方面。学习元素周期表从未如此易于获取和令人兴奋。

我们的应用非常适合学生、专业人士和科学爱好者。无论您是学习化学还是只是对元素世界感到好奇，我们的3D应用都提供了一种教育性和富有娱乐性的体验。

立即下载，沉浸在元素周期表之美中，以前所未有的方式探索、学习并着迷！

cn.description:
Just Press Record 是终极录音应用，只需一键即可录音、转写并通过 iCloud 在所有设备上同步。 你可以编辑音频并且直接在应用内转写文本，还可通过 Siri 直接开始录制新内容！

生活充满了我们不愿忘记的时刻——比如你的孩子说的第一句话、一次重要的会议、一次灵光乍现。 在 iPhone、iPad、Mac 以及 Apple Watch 上便捷的记录这些瞬间。

录音
• 一键即可开始、停止、暂停、继续录音。
• 通过快捷指令、Siri、小组件、三维触控的“快速操作”或 URL 方案来开始和停止录音。
• 录音时间无限制。
• 在后台仍可录音。
• 可选择录音源为内置麦克风、AirPods 或外置麦克风。
• 在 Apple Watch 上独立录音并可之后再同步。

播放
• 在播放过程中向后和向前快速查找。
• 播放速度可调节。

转写
• 将语音识别为可搜索的文字。
• 支持超过 30 种语言，与您设备的语言设置无关。
• 同步文本突出显示和音频播放。
• 在录音时可以识别标点符号口令。

编辑
• 音频 - 以波形视图显示音频，让你可以去掉不需要的部分。
• 文本 - 对转写文本内容进行修改和添加。

分享
• 将音频和文字分享到其他应用。
• 作为视频片段简单分享到社交媒体。
• 通过 USB 连接线分享到 Mac 或 PC 上的 iTunes。
• 打印转写文本。
• 在其他应用中将音频文件分享到 Just Press Record。 

管理
• 查看最近的录音或按照日期时间浏览音频库。
• 按文件名或转写内容搜索。
• 用于快速访问 Apple Watch 录音的专用界面。
• 重命名录音。
• 支持 iPad 的 Slide Over 和 Split View 功能。
• 在应用图标上添加了显示未播放录音的数字。

存储
• 选择将录音存储在 iCloud Drive 或设备本地。
• 存储在 iCloud Drive 的录音将自动在所有设备间同步。
• 录音通过“文件”应用集成和自动 iTunes 文件分享存储在本地。
• 转写内容与音频文件共同储存。

专业音频
• 在支持的设备上通过内置麦克风进行立体声录音。
• 支持通过 Lightning Port 连接的高质量外置麦克风。
• 自定义音频设置以增强您的录音体验。
• 文件类型包括 WAV、AIF 及标准 iTunes M4A (ACC)。
• 音频质量最高可达 96kHz / 24-bit。

辅助功能
• 应用完全支持 VoiceOver 功能。
• 开始/停止录音支持智能手势操作。

Apple Watch
Just Press Record 包含一款 Apple Watch 应用，让你随时随地，即使 iPhone 不在身边，也可以自由录音。

• 轻点功能栏即可开始录音。
• 在后台仍可录音。
• 录音时间无限制。
• 录音自动传输到 iPhone 进行转写并同步到 iCloud。
• 通过内置喇叭或 AirPods 聆听最近的录音。
• 通过 Digital Crown 表冠调节音量。
• 向下滑动即可暂停录音。
• 支持 VoiceOver 辅助功能，降低动作幅度，支持超大功能栏模版。

重要事项:
• Just Press Record 不会录制电话通话内容和来自其他应用的音频。
• 转写功能仅对高质量、低噪音的音频内容有效。  避免录音环境过于嘈杂，将麦克风尽量靠近说话人。
• 您可以在我们的常见问题页面上了解 Just Press Record 的 URL 方案。

cn.releaseNotes:
Welcome to Grooves!

Grooves is the new name for Perfect Tempo.  There's also a new app icon and the interface has a refreshed look with Liquid Glass.

Grooves will never interrupt you to ask for a review - we don’t like being interrupted either! However, App Store ratings and reviews are important, so if you are enjoying Grooves and have a spare minute, we’d be delighted if you could leave a rating or review on the App Store. Thanks!
cn.description:
SLOW DOWN AND SPEED UP ANY SONG
Maybe you’re trying to learn a tricky guitar riff or figure out a new dance routine.  Or maybe you want to change the speed of your favourite tracks to lock into the rhythm of your fitness workout. Grooves lets you continuously adjust the speed of any song in the Apple Music catalog, in your iPhone Music Library or Files app to a speed that’s right for you.

PICK ANY SONG
• Change the tempo of any song on Apple Music, in your Music app or Files app without affecting pitch or fidelity
• Access the entire Apple Music catalog of over 100 million songs!
• Play tracks from the Files app, including on Cloud Drive, Dropbox and other cloud services
• Quick access to your recently played songs

ADJUST THE TEMPO
• A simple slider for adjusting tempo
• Select any tempo from -50% to +100%, in 1% increments
• Easily revert to the original tempo with just one tap
• Grooves will remember your chosen tempo until you want to adjust it again

CREATE SETLISTS
• Create unlimited Setlists
• Continuous play from one song to the next
• Set and remember different tempos for different songs
• Combine songs from Apple Music, your Music app and Files app all in the same Setlist
• Create Setlists from existing albums and playlists in your Music app or on Apple Music

REPEAT JUST ONE SECTION
• Select a section of a song and then loop it to make practise easy
• Add sections of a song to a Setlist multiple times and then play them back at different tempos

APPLE WATCH
• Easily control playback, tempo and volume from your wrist

AIRPLAY
• AirPlay support for output to wireless speakers or Apple TV

AND MORE..
• Change the key (transpose up or down) of locally stored DRM-free songs imported into the app or from your Music app.  (Missing the pitch controls from the last version? Re-enable them in the Settings app > Grooves. Then swipe left on the album artwork when playing a song)

IMPORTANT NOTE!
* Songs from streaming services other than Apple Music are not supported *

cn.description:
从寒冷的城堡冻原，乘坐疾驰的火车穿过沙漠，直至最后的边界。 全力以赴从各种生存条件艰辛密室中逃脱出来。探索各具风格的密室，密室建有多层地板、屋顶、通风口和地下隧道。开发你的创造力，使用各种日用品（肥皂和袜子）或一些有趣的随手可见的餐具等物品（叉子或钢板）制造武器和工具。

【游戏玩法】：
-顶级特色密室：
全力以赴从世界上生存环境最艰苦的密室中逃脱出来。你需要遵守密室的规定，做各种工作并遵循严格的日常安排；所有的一切都是在努力为你争取自由，早日逃出密室！

-建立你的装扮：
从大量的定制中选择你的角色，使其独一无二。当你策划逃脱时，时尚装扮很重要。

-制定你的逃脱计划：
在监狱里，你要开发你的创造力，使用有限的工具来制作各种道具。你可以将日常用品（如肥皂和袜子）组合起来，制造新的武器和工具，以帮助你实现目标。也可以从自助餐厅拿到叉子，在房间里铺一条隧道，并通过杂志和胶带制作海报以隐藏痕迹。你将很快了解到，胶带解决一切！

-逃脱队组合：
联合最多 3 个朋友组建终极逃脱团队，并设计出最疯狂的逃脱计划！聚拢于沙发上，为你的暗中冒险做准备。通过合作，你将创建更加精细和勇敢的计划。感觉没有竞争性？你可以进入对战模式，并显示出你有能力比你的朋友更快地逃脱任何密室。如果其他一切都失败了，在密室天井上解决你的敌对目标！

-准备战斗：
《逃脱者：困境突围》引入了全新的战斗系统，使每个密室的战斗更加激动人心以及具有互动性。你可以保持攻击姿态并围绕你的目标走动，以在作战中获得上风；也可以在合适的时间格挡已减少伤害。确保你先到健身房锻炼肌肉！

-逃脱新方法：
随着密室越来越艰苦，你将不得不策划更加周密的逃脱计划。应对任何密室逃脱都有很多选择。尝试制作药物混合物来伪造自己的死亡，让太平间做剩下的工作！

【游戏特色】：
-最多4名玩家合作逃脱
-玩家之间可以联机对战
-超过 300 个角色装扮定制
-多层密室，给你最真实的场景体验

**********************
【逃脱者：困境突围】

提供客人精心製作的飲品和料理，經營一間廣受大眾喜愛的咖啡店。

每個客人的心情都有所不同，只要提供符合他們需求的飲品，或許他們就會再次來光顧喔。
將這些飲品也加入到招牌菜單中吧！

將美味的料理和飲品搭配在一起……兩者間的主題和適性也很重要喔。
在品評會上以獲得金獎為目標，用出類拔萃的料理來製作套餐吧。

有傳言說到新的城鎮裡有很棒的土地在出售。

來吧，打造出一間讓客人能夠放鬆心情的五星級咖啡店吧！！

自由設置充滿魅力的貨架來經營商店吧。
從基本款的「飯糰」、「便當」到飲料應有盡有，
還能設立美味的｢甜點｣專區！？

收銀機旁邊當然也想擺個暖呼呼的「肉包」，
還有酥酥脆脆的「炸雞塊」跟關東煮呢。
在寒冷季節大快朵頤溫暖身心吧。

召集並培育充滿個性的員工，打造更充實的商店吧。

實現客人小小的夢想也是老闆的工作。
備妥客人想要的品項，讓常客變得越來越多！

關卡各個難度合計共數百個，內容豐富，在其中盡情體驗洛克人的動作吧！

升星後會解放技能，可強化內容也會變多！
卡片設計以原作插圖為基礎，不論強化或收集都樂趣無窮！

「洛克人X」讓人懷念的畫面將忠實原味地呈現。

多多练习，提高操作技术，争夺更高的排名吧！

提供了“全盔甲”、“全武器”等各式各样的辅助功能，能帮助你更顺利地游戏。

hk.description:
Just Press Record 是終極錄音程式，只需一鍵即可錄音、轉寫並透過 iCloud 在所有裝置上同步。 你可以編輯音訊並且直接在程式內轉寫文本，還可透過 Siri 直接開始錄製新內容！

生活充滿了我們不願忘記的時刻——比如你的孩子說的第一句話、一次重要的會議、一次靈光乍現。 在 iPhone、iPad、Mac 以及 Apple Watch 上便捷的記錄這些瞬間。

錄音
• 一鍵即可開始、停止、暫停、繼續錄音。
• 透過捷徑、Siri、小工具、3D Touch 的「快速動作」或 URL 架構來開始和停止錄音。
• 錄音時間無限制。
• 在後台仍可錄音。
• 可選擇錄音源為內置麥克風、AirPods 或外置麥克風。
• 在 Apple Watch 上獨立錄音並可之後再同步。

播放
• 在播放過程中向後和向前快速查找。
• 播放速度可調節。

轉寫
• 將語音辨識為可搜尋的文字。
• 支援超過 30 種語言，與您裝置的語言設定無關。
• 同步文字高亮和音訊播放。
• 在錄音時可以識別標點符號口令。

編輯
• 音訊 - 以波形視圖顯示音訊，讓你可以去掉不需要的部分。
• 文本 - 對轉寫文本內容進行修改和添加。

分享
• 將音訊和文本分享到其他應用程式。
• 作為影片剪輯簡單分享到社群媒體。
• 透過 USB 連接線分享到 Mac 或 PC 上的 iTunes。
• 列印轉寫文本。
• 在其他應用程式中將音訊檔案分享到 Just Press Record。 

管理
• 檢視最近的錄音或按照日期時間瀏覽音訊庫。
• 按檔案名或轉寫內容搜尋。
• 用於快速訪問 Apple Watch 錄音的專用介面。
• 重命名錄音。
• 支援 iPad 的 Slide Over 和 Split View 功能。
• 在應用程式圖示上添加了顯示未播放錄音的數目。

儲存空間
• 選擇將錄音儲存在 iCloud Drive 或裝置本地。
• 儲存在 iCloud Drive 的錄音將自動在所有裝置間同步。
• 錄音通過「檔案」程式整合和自動 iTunes 檔案分享存儲在本地。
• 轉寫內容與音訊檔共同儲存。

專業音訊
• 在支援的裝置上通過內建麥克風進行立體聲錄音。
• 支援透過 Lightning Port 連接的高品質外置麥克風。
• 自訂音訊設定以增強您的錄音體驗。
• 檔案類型包括 WAV、AIF 及標準 iTunes M4A (ACC)。
• 音訊品質最高可達 96kHz / 24-bit。

輔助使用
• 程式完全支援 VoiceOver 功能。
• 開始/停止錄音支持智慧手勢操作。

Apple Watch
Just Press Record 包含一款 Apple Watch 程式，讓你隨時隨地，即使 iPhone 不在身邊，也可以自由錄音。

• 在複雜功能上輕點即可開始錄音。
• 在後台仍可錄音。
• 錄音時間無限制。
• 錄音自動傳輸到 iPhone 進行轉寫並同步到 iCloud。
• 透過內置喇叭或 AirPods 聆聽最近的錄音。
• 透過 Digital Crown 調節音量。
• 向下滑動即可暫停錄音。
• 支援 VoiceOver 輔助使用，降低動作幅度，支援超大複雜功能模版。

重要事項:
• Just Press Record 不會錄製電話通話內容和來自其他應用程式的音訊。
• 轉寫功能僅對高品質、低噪音的音訊內容有效。  避免錄音環境過於嘈雜，將麥克風儘量靠近說話人。
• 您可以在我們的常見問題頁面上瞭解 Just Press Record 的 URL 架構。

三秒記一筆！快速、安全、好用是我們的宗旨，更有 iOS 通知中心的Widget插件。

看看其他人怎麼說：

hk.releaseNotes:
Welcome to Grooves!

Grooves is the new name for Perfect Tempo.  There's also a new app icon and the interface has a refreshed look with Liquid Glass.

Grooves will never interrupt you to ask for a review - we don’t like being interrupted either! However, App Store ratings and reviews are important, so if you are enjoying Grooves and have a spare minute, we’d be delighted if you could leave a rating or review on the App Store. Thanks!
hk.description:
SLOW DOWN AND SPEED UP ANY SONG
Maybe you’re trying to learn a tricky guitar riff or figure out a new dance routine.  Or maybe you want to change the speed of your favourite tracks to lock into the rhythm of your fitness workout. Grooves lets you continuously adjust the speed of any song in the Apple Music catalog, in your iPhone Music Library or Files app to a speed that’s right for you.

PICK ANY SONG
• Change the tempo of any song on Apple Music, in your Music app or Files app without affecting pitch or fidelity
• Access the entire Apple Music catalog of over 100 million songs!
• Play tracks from the Files app, including on Cloud Drive, Dropbox and other cloud services
• Quick access to your recently played songs

ADJUST THE TEMPO
• A simple slider for adjusting tempo
• Select any tempo from -50% to +100%, in 1% increments
• Easily revert to the original tempo with just one tap
• Grooves will remember your chosen tempo until you want to adjust it again

CREATE SETLISTS
• Create unlimited Setlists
• Continuous play from one song to the next
• Set and remember different tempos for different songs
• Combine songs from Apple Music, your Music app and Files app all in the same Setlist
• Create Setlists from existing albums and playlists in your Music app or on Apple Music

REPEAT JUST ONE SECTION
• Select a section of a song and then loop it to make practise easy
• Add sections of a song to a Setlist multiple times and then play them back at different tempos

APPLE WATCH
• Easily control playback, tempo and volume from your wrist

AIRPLAY
• AirPlay support for output to wireless speakers or Apple TV

AND MORE..
• Change the key (transpose up or down) of locally stored DRM-free songs imported into the app or from your Music app.  (Missing the pitch controls from the last version? Re-enable them in the Settings app > Grooves. Then swipe left on the album artwork when playing a song)

IMPORTANT NOTE!
* Songs from streaming services other than Apple Music are not supported *

在寒冷季節大快朵頤溫暖身心吧。

備妥客人想要的品項，讓常客變得越來越多！

為了拓展店面規模，與其他公司合作也是不可或缺的！
透過合作協商來獲得全新的力量吧。

在爭奪客人的戰爭中致勝，衝上全國第一的超商寶座。

來嘗試親手打造出心目中自豪的超商吧。

充分利用各式各樣的武器和強化裝備,粉碎一擊「西格瑪」的野心

◆威力加強部份
1.【對應Retina顯示!!】
「洛克人X」讓人懷念的畫面將忠實原味地呈現。

2.【2種畫面模式!!】
除了遊戲原作畫面全部的「REGULAR(通常)模式」顯示之外另外追加,
在iPhone螢幕上(裡)提供以全面顯示的「FULL(全屏幕)模式」搭載。

3.【三种游戏难度！ 】
“故事模式”有简单、普通、困难这3种难度。
在“简单”难度中，关卡内的“落脚处”四处可见，能够防止玩家掉落。
如果你对操作有自信，推荐选择需要技巧的“困难”！

4.【 排行榜模式！（Game Center支持功能） 】
提供了可以与其他玩家争夺排行榜排名的“ 排行榜模式”。
具备按分数排名的“高分模式”、按最快通关排名的“竞时模式”、按通关数量排名的“无限模式”。
多多练习，提高操作技术，争夺更高的排名吧！

5.【80個挑戰!!(支援GameCenter功能)】
「STORY MODE」挑戰序幕關卡,挑戰20個(*1),在完成序幕關卡之後,提供60種的合計80種挑戰項目!
※關於(*1)的內容是不支援GameCenter功能。

不知道在哪里能获得隐藏的强化装备、或者想尽快强化的时候，即可通过“个性化设置”简单入手！
提供了“全盔甲”、“全武器”等各式各样的辅助功能，能帮助你更顺利地游戏。
使用实惠的“完美套装”，拥有最强装备！还具备“编曲BGM”，能变更游戏原本的BGM！

※辅助功能和“编曲BGM”需要付费购买。

mo.releaseNotes:
Welcome to Grooves!

Grooves is the new name for Perfect Tempo.  There's also a new app icon and the interface has a refreshed look with Liquid Glass.

Grooves will never interrupt you to ask for a review - we don’t like being interrupted either! However, App Store ratings and reviews are important, so if you are enjoying Grooves and have a spare minute, we’d be delighted if you could leave a rating or review on the App Store. Thanks!
mo.description:
SLOW DOWN AND SPEED UP ANY SONG
Maybe you’re trying to learn a tricky guitar riff or figure out a new dance routine.  Or maybe you want to change the speed of your favourite tracks to lock into the rhythm of your fitness workout. Grooves lets you continuously adjust the speed of any song in the Apple Music catalog, in your iPhone Music Library or Files app to a speed that’s right for you.

PICK ANY SONG
• Change the tempo of any song on Apple Music, in your Music app or Files app without affecting pitch or fidelity
• Access the entire Apple Music catalog of over 100 million songs!
• Play tracks from the Files app, including on Cloud Drive, Dropbox and other cloud services
• Quick access to your recently played songs

ADJUST THE TEMPO
• A simple slider for adjusting tempo
• Select any tempo from -50% to +100%, in 1% increments
• Easily revert to the original tempo with just one tap
• Grooves will remember your chosen tempo until you want to adjust it again

CREATE SETLISTS
• Create unlimited Setlists
• Continuous play from one song to the next
• Set and remember different tempos for different songs
• Combine songs from Apple Music, your Music app and Files app all in the same Setlist
• Create Setlists from existing albums and playlists in your Music app or on Apple Music

REPEAT JUST ONE SECTION
• Select a section of a song and then loop it to make practise easy
• Add sections of a song to a Setlist multiple times and then play them back at different tempos

APPLE WATCH
• Easily control playback, tempo and volume from your wrist

AIRPLAY
• AirPlay support for output to wireless speakers or Apple TV

AND MORE..
• Change the key (transpose up or down) of locally stored DRM-free songs imported into the app or from your Music app.  (Missing the pitch controls from the last version? Re-enable them in the Settings app > Grooves. Then swipe left on the album artwork when playing a song)

IMPORTANT NOTE!
* Songs from streaming services other than Apple Music are not supported *

mo.releaseNotes:
本次更新修復了一些其他 bug 並提升了性能。

Just Press Record 從來不會在程式中用請求評分來打擾你——我們自己也不希望被打擾。 然而，App Store 的分數和評價的確很重要，所以如果你覺得 Just Press Record 很好用並且有那麼一點空餘時間的話，我們樂於在 App Store 上看到你的打分和評論。 感謝！
mo.description:
Just Press Record 是終極錄音程式，只需一鍵即可錄音、轉寫並透過 iCloud 在所有裝置上同步。 你可以編輯音訊並且直接在程式內轉寫文本，還可透過 Siri 直接開始錄製新內容！

生活充滿了我們不願忘記的時刻——比如你的孩子說的第一句話、一次重要的會議、一次靈光乍現。 在 iPhone、iPad、Mac 以及 Apple Watch 上便捷的記錄這些瞬間。

錄音
• 一鍵即可開始、停止、暫停、繼續錄音。
• 透過捷徑、Siri、小工具、3D Touch 的「快速動作」或 URL 架構來開始和停止錄音。
• 錄音時間無限制。
• 在後台仍可錄音。
• 可選擇錄音源為內置麥克風、AirPods 或外置麥克風。
• 在 Apple Watch 上獨立錄音並可之後再同步。

播放
• 在播放過程中向後和向前快速查找。
• 播放速度可調節。

轉寫
• 將語音辨識為可搜尋的文字。
• 支援超過 30 種語言，與您裝置的語言設定無關。
• 同步文字高亮和音訊播放。
• 在錄音時可以識別標點符號口令。

編輯
• 音訊 - 以波形視圖顯示音訊，讓你可以去掉不需要的部分。
• 文本 - 對轉寫文本內容進行修改和添加。

分享
• 將音訊和文本分享到其他應用程式。
• 作為影片剪輯簡單分享到社群媒體。
• 透過 USB 連接線分享到 Mac 或 PC 上的 iTunes。
• 列印轉寫文本。
• 在其他應用程式中將音訊檔案分享到 Just Press Record。 

管理
• 檢視最近的錄音或按照日期時間瀏覽音訊庫。
• 按檔案名或轉寫內容搜尋。
• 用於快速訪問 Apple Watch 錄音的專用介面。
• 重命名錄音。
• 支援 iPad 的 Slide Over 和 Split View 功能。
• 在應用程式圖示上添加了顯示未播放錄音的數目。

儲存空間
• 選擇將錄音儲存在 iCloud Drive 或裝置本地。
• 儲存在 iCloud Drive 的錄音將自動在所有裝置間同步。
• 錄音通過「檔案」程式整合和自動 iTunes 檔案分享存儲在本地。
• 轉寫內容與音訊檔共同儲存。

專業音訊
• 在支援的裝置上通過內建麥克風進行立體聲錄音。
• 支援透過 Lightning Port 連接的高品質外置麥克風。
• 自訂音訊設定以增強您的錄音體驗。
• 檔案類型包括 WAV、AIF 及標準 iTunes M4A (ACC)。
• 音訊品質最高可達 96kHz / 24-bit。

輔助使用
• 程式完全支援 VoiceOver 功能。
• 開始/停止錄音支持智慧手勢操作。

Apple Watch
Just Press Record 包含一款 Apple Watch 程式，讓你隨時隨地，即使 iPhone 不在身邊，也可以自由錄音。

• 在複雜功能上輕點即可開始錄音。
• 在後台仍可錄音。
• 錄音時間無限制。
• 錄音自動傳輸到 iPhone 進行轉寫並同步到 iCloud。
• 透過內置喇叭或 AirPods 聆聽最近的錄音。
• 透過 Digital Crown 調節音量。
• 向下滑動即可暫停錄音。
• 支援 VoiceOver 輔助使用，降低動作幅度，支援超大複雜功能模版。

重要事項:
• Just Press Record 不會錄製電話通話內容和來自其他應用程式的音訊。
• 轉寫功能僅對高品質、低噪音的音訊內容有效。  避免錄音環境過於嘈雜，將麥克風儘量靠近說話人。
• 您可以在我們的常見問題頁面上瞭解 Just Press Record 的 URL 架構。

Grooves will never interrupt you to ask for a review - we don’t like being interrupted either! However, App Store ratings and reviews are important, so if you are enjoying Grooves and have a spare minute, we’d be delighted if you could leave a rating or review on the App Store. Thanks!
tw.description:
SLOW DOWN AND SPEED UP ANY SONG
Maybe you’re trying to learn a tricky guitar riff or figure out a new dance routine.  Or maybe you want to change the speed of your favourite tracks to lock into the rhythm of your fitness workout. Grooves lets you continuously adjust the speed of any song in the Apple Music catalog, in your iPhone Music Library or Files app to a speed that’s right for you.

PICK ANY SONG
• Change the tempo of any song on Apple Music, in your Music app or Files app without affecting pitch or fidelity
• Access the entire Apple Music catalog of over 100 million songs!
• Play tracks from the Files app, including on Cloud Drive, Dropbox and other cloud services
• Quick access to your recently played songs

ADJUST THE TEMPO
• A simple slider for adjusting tempo
• Select any tempo from -50% to +100%, in 1% increments
• Easily revert to the original tempo with just one tap
• Grooves will remember your chosen tempo until you want to adjust it again

CREATE SETLISTS
• Create unlimited Setlists
• Continuous play from one song to the next
• Set and remember different tempos for different songs
• Combine songs from Apple Music, your Music app and Files app all in the same Setlist
• Create Setlists from existing albums and playlists in your Music app or on Apple Music

REPEAT JUST ONE SECTION
• Select a section of a song and then loop it to make practise easy
• Add sections of a song to a Setlist multiple times and then play them back at different tempos

APPLE WATCH
• Easily control playback, tempo and volume from your wrist

AIRPLAY
• AirPlay support for output to wireless speakers or Apple TV

AND MORE..
• Change the key (transpose up or down) of locally stored DRM-free songs imported into the app or from your Music app.  (Missing the pitch controls from the last version? Re-enable them in the Settings app > Grooves. Then swipe left on the album artwork when playing a song)

IMPORTANT NOTE!
* Songs from streaming services other than Apple Music are not supported *

Just Press Record 是終極錄音程式，只需一鍵即可錄音、轉寫並透過 iCloud 在所有裝置上同步。 你可以編輯音訊並且直接在程式內轉寫文本，還可透過 Siri 直接開始錄製新內容！

生活充滿了我們不願忘記的時刻——比如你的孩子說的第一句話、一次重要的會議、一次靈光乍現。 在 iPhone、iPad、Mac 以及 Apple Watch 上便捷的記錄這些瞬間。

錄音
• 一鍵即可開始、停止、暫停、繼續錄音。
• 透過捷徑、Siri、小工具、3D Touch 的「快速動作」或 URL 架構來開始和停止錄音。
• 錄音時間無限制。
• 在後台仍可錄音。
• 可選擇錄音源為內置麥克風、AirPods 或外置麥克風。
• 在 Apple Watch 上獨立錄音並可之後再同步。

播放
• 在播放過程中向後和向前快速查找。
• 播放速度可調節。

轉寫
• 將語音辨識為可搜尋的文字。
• 支援超過 30 種語言，與您裝置的語言設定無關。
• 同步文字高亮和音訊播放。
• 在錄音時可以識別標點符號口令。

編輯
• 音訊 - 以波形視圖顯示音訊，讓你可以去掉不需要的部分。
• 文本 - 對轉寫文本內容進行修改和添加。

分享
• 將音訊和文本分享到其他應用程式。
• 作為影片剪輯簡單分享到社群媒體。
• 透過 USB 連接線分享到 Mac 或 PC 上的 iTunes。
• 列印轉寫文本。
• 在其他應用程式中將音訊檔案分享到 Just Press Record。 

管理
• 檢視最近的錄音或按照日期時間瀏覽音訊庫。
• 按檔案名或轉寫內容搜尋。
• 用於快速訪問 Apple Watch 錄音的專用介面。
• 重命名錄音。
• 支援 iPad 的 Slide Over 和 Split View 功能。
• 在應用程式圖示上添加了顯示未播放錄音的數目。

儲存空間
• 選擇將錄音儲存在 iCloud Drive 或裝置本地。
• 儲存在 iCloud Drive 的錄音將自動在所有裝置間同步。
• 錄音通過「檔案」程式整合和自動 iTunes 檔案分享存儲在本地。
• 轉寫內容與音訊檔共同儲存。

專業音訊
• 在支援的裝置上通過內建麥克風進行立體聲錄音。
• 支援透過 Lightning Port 連接的高品質外置麥克風。
• 自訂音訊設定以增強您的錄音體驗。
• 檔案類型包括 WAV、AIF 及標準 iTunes M4A (ACC)。
• 音訊品質最高可達 96kHz / 24-bit。

輔助使用
• 程式完全支援 VoiceOver 功能。
• 開始/停止錄音支持智慧手勢操作。

Apple Watch
Just Press Record 包含一款 Apple Watch 程式，讓你隨時隨地，即使 iPhone 不在身邊，也可以自由錄音。

• 在複雜功能上輕點即可開始錄音。
• 在後台仍可錄音。
• 錄音時間無限制。
• 錄音自動傳輸到 iPhone 進行轉寫並同步到 iCloud。
• 透過內置喇叭或 AirPods 聆聽最近的錄音。
• 透過 Digital Crown 調節音量。
• 向下滑動即可暫停錄音。
• 支援 VoiceOver 輔助使用，降低動作幅度，支援超大複雜功能模版。

重要事項:
• Just Press Record 不會錄製電話通話內容和來自其他應用程式的音訊。
• 轉寫功能僅對高品質、低噪音的音訊內容有效。  避免錄音環境過於嘈雜，將麥克風儘量靠近說話人。
• 您可以在我們的常見問題頁面上瞭解 Just Press Record 的 URL 架構。

us.description:
LaxtTime is a simple and easy-to-use recording app that you can use to track anything in your life.
 
If you have recurring events in your life, LaxtTime is perfect for keeping track of them.

#For example, you can record

The last time you cleaned the kitchen

The last time you meditated

The last time you exercised, drank water, went shopping...

LaxtTime not only accurately records the last occurrence of each event but also automatically reminds you based on intervals you set.

It's your reliable memory assistant, allowing you to focus on living without worrying about remembering trivial matters.

#Features

[Record Last Occurrence]

LaxtTime records the time since each event last occurred, accurate to the minute.

If you often can't remember when something last happened, LaxtTime is your reliable assistant. LaxtTime remembers everything for you, so you don’t have to.

[Repeat Reminders]

LaxtTime has only one reminder function, which is to remind you repeatedly based on the time interval you set. Once you complete the task, the reminder countdown resets.

You can also turn off reminders and only record the last occurrence time.

Simple design, appropriate reminders.

[Schedule Management]

LaxtTime also provides a simple and easy-to-use calendar to help you manage your schedule.

[Data Statistics]

LaxtTime also has powerful data statistics functions. You can view activity status by week, month, and year, including check-in days, check-in times, average intervals, and other information.

At the same time, LaxtTime will help you calculate the average number of check-ins and check-in times, helping you discover patterns in your life.

[Flexible Recording]

LaxtTime supports recording four types of attributes: notes, pictures, options, and values.

You can create several options, such as choosing [Running], [Rowing], [Swimming]... to record each of your workouts.

You can also record the distance of each run, [3km], [4km]...

[Clean UI]

LaxtTime features carefully designed light and dark theme color schemes, as well as a very clean UI, allowing you to quickly obtain the information you need.

[Rich Personalization]

LaxtTime offers dozens of preset colors, and you can also customize colors to mark your records.

At the same time, LaxtTime supports a wealth of settings to personalize your experience.

[Practical Widgets]

Supports widget check-ins and countdown displays.

[Heat Map]

Use heat maps to understand your activity patterns.

[Membership Instructions]
Members can unlock all paid features of LaxtTime and enjoy free updates for future advanced features.

us.releaseNotes:
Welcome to Grooves!

Grooves is the new name for Perfect Tempo.  There's also a new app icon and the interface has a refreshed look with Liquid Glass.

Grooves will never interrupt you to ask for a review - we don’t like being interrupted either! However, App Store ratings and reviews are important, so if you are enjoying Grooves and have a spare minute, we’d be delighted if you could leave a rating or review on the App Store. Thanks!
us.description:
SLOW DOWN AND SPEED UP ANY SONG
Maybe you’re trying to learn a tricky guitar riff or figure out a new dance routine.  Or maybe you want to change the speed of your favourite tracks to lock into the rhythm of your fitness workout. Grooves lets you continuously adjust the speed of any song in the Apple Music catalog, in your iPhone Music Library or Files app to a speed that’s right for you.

PICK ANY SONG
• Change the tempo of any song on Apple Music, in your Music app or Files app without affecting pitch or fidelity
• Access the entire Apple Music catalog of over 100 million songs!
• Play tracks from the Files app, including on Cloud Drive, Dropbox and other cloud services
• Quick access to your recently played songs

ADJUST THE TEMPO
• A simple slider for adjusting tempo
• Select any tempo from -50% to +100%, in 1% increments
• Easily revert to the original tempo with just one tap
• Grooves will remember your chosen tempo until you want to adjust it again

CREATE SETLISTS
• Create unlimited Setlists
• Continuous play from one song to the next
• Set and remember different tempos for different songs
• Combine songs from Apple Music, your Music app and Files app all in the same Setlist
• Create Setlists from existing albums and playlists in your Music app or on Apple Music

REPEAT JUST ONE SECTION
• Select a section of a song and then loop it to make practise easy
• Add sections of a song to a Setlist multiple times and then play them back at different tempos

APPLE WATCH
• Easily control playback, tempo and volume from your wrist

AIRPLAY
• AirPlay support for output to wireless speakers or Apple TV

AND MORE..
• Change the key (transpose up or down) of locally stored DRM-free songs imported into the app or from your Music app.  (Missing the pitch controls from the last version? Re-enable them in the Settings app > Grooves. Then swipe left on the album artwork when playing a song)

IMPORTANT NOTE!
* Songs from streaming services other than Apple Music are not supported *

us.description:
Just Press Record is the ultimate audio recorder bringing one tap recording, transcription and iCloud syncing to all your devices. You can edit your audio and transcriptions right inside the app and even start a new recording completely hands-free with Siri!

Life is full of moments we would rather not forget - like your child’s first words, an important meeting or spontaneous idea. Capture these moments effortlessly on iPhone, iPad, Mac or for ultimate convenience, Apple Watch.

RECORD
• One tap to start, stop, pause and resume recording.
• Start and stop recording from the Lock Screen, Control Centre, the Action Button, Shortcuts, Siri, the Widget, a 3D Touch Quick Action or via the URL scheme.
• Unlimited recording time.
• Record discretely in the background.
• Choose to record from the built-in mic, AirPods or external microphones.
• Record independently on Apple Watch and sync later.

PLAY
• Seek backwards and forwards during playback.
• Adjustable playback speed.

TRANSCRIBE
• Turn speech into searchable text.
• Support for over 30 languages, independent of your device's language setting.
• Synchronized text highlighting and audio playback.
• Format as you record with punctuation commands.

EDIT
• Audio - visualise your audio in the waveform view and cut out the parts you don’t need.
• Text - make corrections and add new text to your transcriptions.

SHARE
• Share audio and text to other apps.
• Share easily to social media as a video clip.
• Share to iTunes on Mac or PC via USB cable.
• Print a hard copy of your transcripts.
• Share audio files from other apps to Just Press Record. 

ORGANISATION
• View recent recordings or browse your library by date and time.
• Search by filename or transcription content.
• Dedicated tab for quick access to recordings made on Apple Watch.
• Rename recordings.
• Slide Over and Split View support on iPad.
• Add a badge to the app icon showing the number of unplayed recordings.

STORAGE
• Choose to store recordings in iCloud Drive or locally on-device.
• Recordings stored in iCloud Drive automatically sync across all your devices.
• Recordings stored locally benefit from Files app integration and automatic iTunes File Sharing.
• Transcriptions are stored within the audio file.

PRO-AUDIO
• Support for stereo recording from the built-in microphone on supported devices.
• Support for high quality external microphones connected via the Lightning Port.
• Customisable Audio Settings to enhance your recording experience.
• File types include WAV, AIF or standard iTunes M4A (ACC).
• High quality audio up to 96kHz / 24-bit.

ACCESSIBILITY
• VoiceOver support throughout the app.
• Magic Tap gesture to start / stop a recording.

APPLE WATCH
Just Press Record includes an Apple Watch app that gives you the freedom to record anywhere, even when your iPhone is not around.

• Start recording with a single tap on the Complication.
• Record discretely in the background.
• Unlimited recording time.
• Recordings automatically transfer to iPhone for transcription and iCloud syncing.
• Listen to recent recordings through the built-in speaker or AirPods.
• Adjust volume with the Digital Crown.
• Pause recording with a downward swipe.
• Accessibility support with VoiceOver, reduced motion and support for the extra large Complication template.

IMPORTANT:
• Just Press Record does not record phone calls or audio from other apps.
• Transcription requires a good, clean audio signal.  Avoid recording in noisy environments and ensure the microphone is positioned close to the source.
• URL scheme implemented by Just Press Record can be found on our FAQ page.

Discover the Periodic Table like never before with our innovative 3D app! Immerse yourself in the fascinating world of elements in a completely new and visually stunning way. Our app offers you a minimalist and captivating experience that will make exploring the Periodic Table a uniquely engaging journey.

With our intuitive interface and minimalist design, you can effortlessly navigate through the elements. Each element comes to life in a captivating 3D environment, allowing you to visualize its structure in a way you've never experienced before. Witness how elements interact with each other and uncover their properties in a completely new light.

Want to learn more about a specific element? Our app provides detailed and easily understandable information about each element, covering everything from its physical and chemical properties to its history and practical uses. Learning about the Periodic Table has never been so accessible and exciting.

Perfect for students, professionals, and science enthusiasts alike, our app caters to all. Whether you're studying chemistry or simply curious about the world of elements, our 3D app offers an educational and entertaining experience.

Download now and dive into the beauty of the Periodic Table in a way you never imagined. Explore, learn, and marvel at the elements with our 3D app today!

Keep the words, pictures, videos, voice and positions you want to record at any time and anywhere.
And there are reminders that you can never forget.

The smell of fresh roast beans, the gurgling of the espresso machine, the sheen of a squeaky-clean counter... All this and more await you in this quirky sim game!

Coffee and tea are just the beginning—there's a whole world of hot and cold drinks out there just waiting to be discovered! Try out different combinations to make your regulars happy, or attract new customers. You can even recommend your favorites via the Specials Board.

Feel like a little something on the side? Combine food items with drinks to create Combo Meals. These can also be entered into contests—pick the right meal for the right theme, and you're sure to win it big and make your cafe even more popular!

--- Game Introduction ---

Mega Man X DiVE reimagined the world of the Mega Man X series, and now it's getting an offline version!
Experience the exciting side-scrolling action we've all come to know and love in a whole new light!

Enter Deep Log, a digital world where the game data of the Mega Man X series has been archived. Due to a bug of unknown origins, the game data within Deep Log has become fragmented. With the help of a mysterious navigator, RiCO, the player dives into this digital world to set things straight.
Take control of Hunter Programs, recreations of legendary characters such as X and Zero, defeat various forms of Irregular Data, and restore the fractured game data!

- Classic Mega Man Action
Jump, dash, fire your buster, and swing your saber. All the actions you'd expect from the Mega Man X series are here!
In addition, this game features 360 degree aiming and an auto-lock function!
You can also scale and position the touchscreen controls to match your own unique playstyle.

tr.description:
LaxtTime is a simple and easy-to-use recording app that you can use to track anything in your life.
 
If you have recurring events in your life, LaxtTime is perfect for keeping track of them.

#For example, you can record

The last time you cleaned the kitchen

The last time you meditated

The last time you exercised, drank water, went shopping...

LaxtTime not only accurately records the last occurrence of each event but also automatically reminds you based on intervals you set.

It's your reliable memory assistant, allowing you to focus on living without worrying about remembering trivial matters.

#Features

[Record Last Occurrence]

LaxtTime records the time since each event last occurred, accurate to the minute.

If you often can't remember when something last happened, LaxtTime is your reliable assistant. LaxtTime remembers everything for you, so you don’t have to.

[Repeat Reminders]

LaxtTime has only one reminder function, which is to remind you repeatedly based on the time interval you set. Once you complete the task, the reminder countdown resets.

You can also turn off reminders and only record the last occurrence time.

Simple design, appropriate reminders.

[Schedule Management]

LaxtTime also provides a simple and easy-to-use calendar to help you manage your schedule.

[Data Statistics]

LaxtTime also has powerful data statistics functions. You can view activity status by week, month, and year, including check-in days, check-in times, average intervals, and other information.

At the same time, LaxtTime will help you calculate the average number of check-ins and check-in times, helping you discover patterns in your life.

[Flexible Recording]

LaxtTime supports recording four types of attributes: notes, pictures, options, and values.

You can create several options, such as choosing [Running], [Rowing], [Swimming]... to record each of your workouts.

You can also record the distance of each run, [3km], [4km]...

[Clean UI]

LaxtTime features carefully designed light and dark theme color schemes, as well as a very clean UI, allowing you to quickly obtain the information you need.

[Rich Personalization]

LaxtTime offers dozens of preset colors, and you can also customize colors to mark your records.

At the same time, LaxtTime supports a wealth of settings to personalize your experience.

[Practical Widgets]

Supports widget check-ins and countdown displays.

[Heat Map]

Use heat maps to understand your activity patterns.

[Membership Instructions]
Members can unlock all paid features of LaxtTime and enjoy free updates for future advanced features.

Grooves is the new name for Perfect Tempo.  There's also a new app icon and the interface has a refreshed look with Liquid Glass.

Grooves will never interrupt you to ask for a review - we don’t like being interrupted either! However, App Store ratings and reviews are important, so if you are enjoying Grooves and have a spare minute, we’d be delighted if you could leave a rating or review on the App Store. Thanks!
tr.description:
SLOW DOWN AND SPEED UP ANY SONG
Maybe you’re trying to learn a tricky guitar riff or figure out a new dance routine.  Or maybe you want to change the speed of your favourite tracks to lock into the rhythm of your fitness workout. Grooves lets you continuously adjust the speed of any song in the Apple Music catalog, in your iPhone Music Library or Files app to a speed that’s right for you.

PICK ANY SONG
• Change the tempo of any song on Apple Music, in your Music app or Files app without affecting pitch or fidelity
• Access the entire Apple Music catalog of over 100 million songs!
• Play tracks from the Files app, including on Cloud Drive, Dropbox and other cloud services
• Quick access to your recently played songs

ADJUST THE TEMPO
• A simple slider for adjusting tempo
• Select any tempo from -50% to +100%, in 1% increments
• Easily revert to the original tempo with just one tap
• Grooves will remember your chosen tempo until you want to adjust it again

CREATE SETLISTS
• Create unlimited Setlists
• Continuous play from one song to the next
• Set and remember different tempos for different songs
• Combine songs from Apple Music, your Music app and Files app all in the same Setlist
• Create Setlists from existing albums and playlists in your Music app or on Apple Music

REPEAT JUST ONE SECTION
• Select a section of a song and then loop it to make practise easy
• Add sections of a song to a Setlist multiple times and then play them back at different tempos

APPLE WATCH
• Easily control playback, tempo and volume from your wrist

AIRPLAY
• AirPlay support for output to wireless speakers or Apple TV

AND MORE..
• Change the key (transpose up or down) of locally stored DRM-free songs imported into the app or from your Music app.  (Missing the pitch controls from the last version? Re-enable them in the Settings app > Grooves. Then swipe left on the album artwork when playing a song)

IMPORTANT NOTE!
* Songs from streaming services other than Apple Music are not supported *

tr.description:
Just Press Record is the ultimate audio recorder bringing one tap recording, transcription and iCloud syncing to all your devices. You can edit your audio and transcriptions right inside the app and even start a new recording completely hands-free with Siri!

Life is full of moments we would rather not forget - like your child’s first words, an important meeting or spontaneous idea. Capture these moments effortlessly on iPhone, iPad, Mac or for ultimate convenience, Apple Watch.

RECORD
• One tap to start, stop, pause and resume recording.
• Start and stop recording from the Lock Screen, Control Centre, the Action Button, Shortcuts, Siri, the Widget, a 3D Touch Quick Action or via the URL scheme.
• Unlimited recording time.
• Record discretely in the background.
• Choose to record from the built-in mic, AirPods or external microphones.
• Record independently on Apple Watch and sync later.

PLAY
• Seek backwards and forwards during playback.
• Adjustable playback speed.

TRANSCRIBE
• Turn speech into searchable text.
• Support for over 30 languages, independent of your device's language setting.
• Synchronized text highlighting and audio playback.
• Format as you record with punctuation commands.

EDIT
• Audio - visualise your audio in the waveform view and cut out the parts you don’t need.
• Text - make corrections and add new text to your transcriptions.

SHARE
• Share audio and text to other apps.
• Share easily to social media as a video clip.
• Share to iTunes on Mac or PC via USB cable.
• Print a hard copy of your transcripts.
• Share audio files from other apps to Just Press Record. 

ORGANISATION
• View recent recordings or browse your library by date and time.
• Search by filename or transcription content.
• Dedicated tab for quick access to recordings made on Apple Watch.
• Rename recordings.
• Slide Over and Split View support on iPad.
• Add a badge to the app icon showing the number of unplayed recordings.

STORAGE
• Choose to store recordings in iCloud Drive or locally on-device.
• Recordings stored in iCloud Drive automatically sync across all your devices.
• Recordings stored locally benefit from Files app integration and automatic iTunes File Sharing.
• Transcriptions are stored within the audio file.

PRO-AUDIO
• Support for stereo recording from the built-in microphone on supported devices.
• Support for high quality external microphones connected via the Lightning Port.
• Customisable Audio Settings to enhance your recording experience.
• File types include WAV, AIF or standard iTunes M4A (ACC).
• High quality audio up to 96kHz / 24-bit.

ACCESSIBILITY
• VoiceOver support throughout the app.
• Magic Tap gesture to start / stop a recording.

APPLE WATCH
Just Press Record includes an Apple Watch app that gives you the freedom to record anywhere, even when your iPhone is not around.

• Start recording with a single tap on the Complication.
• Record discretely in the background.
• Unlimited recording time.
• Recordings automatically transfer to iPhone for transcription and iCloud syncing.
• Listen to recent recordings through the built-in speaker or AirPods.
• Adjust volume with the Digital Crown.
• Pause recording with a downward swipe.
• Accessibility support with VoiceOver, reduced motion and support for the extra large Complication template.

IMPORTANT:
• Just Press Record does not record phone calls or audio from other apps.
• Transcription requires a good, clean audio signal.  Avoid recording in noisy environments and ensure the microphone is positioned close to the source.
• URL scheme implemented by Just Press Record can be found on our FAQ page.

Quer saber mais sobre um elemento específico? Nosso aplicativo fornece informações detalhadas e de fácil compreensão sobre cada elemento, desde suas propriedades físicas e químicas até sua história e usos práticos. A aprendizagem da Tabela Periódica nunca foi tão acessível e emocionante.

Além disso, nosso aplicativo é perfeito para estudantes, profissionais e entusiastas da ciência. Seja você estudando química ou apenas curioso sobre o mundo dos elementos, nosso aplicativo 3D oferece uma experiência educacional e divertida.

Baixe agora e mergulhe na beleza da Tabela Periódica de uma maneira que você nunca imaginou. Explore, aprenda e maravilhe-se com os elementos com nosso aplicativo 3D hoje!

Have you ever wanted to run your own coffee shop?

The smell of fresh roast beans, the gurgling of the espresso machine, the sheen of a squeaky-clean counter... All this and more await you in this quirky sim game!

Just set up your tables and counter seats, and wait for the customers to come rolling in. Add handy features like magazine racks, or chic furnishings to give your cafe a more welcoming atmosphere.

Coffee and tea are just the beginning—there's a whole world of hot and cold drinks out there just waiting to be discovered! Try out different combinations to make your regulars happy, or attract new customers. You can even recommend your favorites via the Specials Board.

Feel like a little something on the side? Combine food items with drinks to create Combo Meals. These can also be entered into contests—pick the right meal for the right theme, and you're sure to win it big and make your cafe even more popular!

You're not just limited to one town, either. You can move your cafe to several new locations and discover new customers. You may even encounter some familiar faces...

Sometimes the fastest way to your customers' hearts is through their stomachs! Stock hot snacks to entice passers-by to fill their bellies and lighten their wallets.

Running a good store is a team effort. You'll have to recruit new employees to make the most of your working hours. Before you know it, you'll be offering 24-hour service all year long!

pt.description:
LaxtTime is a simple and easy-to-use recording app that you can use to track anything in your life.
 
If you have recurring events in your life, LaxtTime is perfect for keeping track of them.

#For example, you can record

The last time you cleaned the kitchen

The last time you meditated

The last time you exercised, drank water, went shopping...

LaxtTime not only accurately records the last occurrence of each event but also automatically reminds you based on intervals you set.

It's your reliable memory assistant, allowing you to focus on living without worrying about remembering trivial matters.

#Features

[Record Last Occurrence]

LaxtTime records the time since each event last occurred, accurate to the minute.

If you often can't remember when something last happened, LaxtTime is your reliable assistant. LaxtTime remembers everything for you, so you don’t have to.

[Repeat Reminders]

LaxtTime has only one reminder function, which is to remind you repeatedly based on the time interval you set. Once you complete the task, the reminder countdown resets.

You can also turn off reminders and only record the last occurrence time.

Simple design, appropriate reminders.

[Schedule Management]

LaxtTime also provides a simple and easy-to-use calendar to help you manage your schedule.

[Data Statistics]

LaxtTime also has powerful data statistics functions. You can view activity status by week, month, and year, including check-in days, check-in times, average intervals, and other information.

At the same time, LaxtTime will help you calculate the average number of check-ins and check-in times, helping you discover patterns in your life.

[Flexible Recording]

LaxtTime supports recording four types of attributes: notes, pictures, options, and values.

You can create several options, such as choosing [Running], [Rowing], [Swimming]... to record each of your workouts.

You can also record the distance of each run, [3km], [4km]...

[Clean UI]

LaxtTime features carefully designed light and dark theme color schemes, as well as a very clean UI, allowing you to quickly obtain the information you need.

[Rich Personalization]

LaxtTime offers dozens of preset colors, and you can also customize colors to mark your records.

At the same time, LaxtTime supports a wealth of settings to personalize your experience.

[Practical Widgets]

Supports widget check-ins and countdown displays.

[Heat Map]

Use heat maps to understand your activity patterns.

[Membership Instructions]
Members can unlock all paid features of LaxtTime and enjoy free updates for future advanced features.

Welcome to Grooves!

Grooves is the new name for Perfect Tempo.  There's also a new app icon and the interface has a refreshed look with Liquid Glass.

Grooves will never interrupt you to ask for a review - we don’t like being interrupted either! However, App Store ratings and reviews are important, so if you are enjoying Grooves and have a spare minute, we’d be delighted if you could leave a rating or review on the App Store. Thanks!
pt.description:
SLOW DOWN AND SPEED UP ANY SONG
Maybe you’re trying to learn a tricky guitar riff or figure out a new dance routine.  Or maybe you want to change the speed of your favourite tracks to lock into the rhythm of your fitness workout. Grooves lets you continuously adjust the speed of any song in the Apple Music catalog, in your iPhone Music Library or Files app to a speed that’s right for you.

PICK ANY SONG
• Change the tempo of any song on Apple Music, in your Music app or Files app without affecting pitch or fidelity
• Access the entire Apple Music catalog of over 100 million songs!
• Play tracks from the Files app, including on Cloud Drive, Dropbox and other cloud services
• Quick access to your recently played songs

ADJUST THE TEMPO
• A simple slider for adjusting tempo
• Select any tempo from -50% to +100%, in 1% increments
• Easily revert to the original tempo with just one tap
• Grooves will remember your chosen tempo until you want to adjust it again

CREATE SETLISTS
• Create unlimited Setlists
• Continuous play from one song to the next
• Set and remember different tempos for different songs
• Combine songs from Apple Music, your Music app and Files app all in the same Setlist
• Create Setlists from existing albums and playlists in your Music app or on Apple Music

REPEAT JUST ONE SECTION
• Select a section of a song and then loop it to make practise easy
• Add sections of a song to a Setlist multiple times and then play them back at different tempos

APPLE WATCH
• Easily control playback, tempo and volume from your wrist

AIRPLAY
• AirPlay support for output to wireless speakers or Apple TV

AND MORE..
• Change the key (transpose up or down) of locally stored DRM-free songs imported into the app or from your Music app.  (Missing the pitch controls from the last version? Re-enable them in the Settings app > Grooves. Then swipe left on the album artwork when playing a song)

IMPORTANT NOTE!
* Songs from streaming services other than Apple Music are not supported *

pt.description:
Just Press Record é o gravador de áudio que grava, transcreve e sincroniza com iCloud e todos os seus dispositivos, com um toque. Edite transcrições de áudio direto no aplicativo e até mesmo inicie uma nova gravação, tudo sem usar as mãos, com a Siri!

A vida é repleta de momentos memoráveis, como as primeiras palavras do seu filho, reuniões importantes ou ideias espontâneas. Capture momentos sem esforço no iPhone, no iPad e no Mac ou, para ter total praticidade, no Apple Watch.

GRAVE
• Toque para iniciar, interromper, pausar e reiniciar a gravação.
• Inicie e interrompa a gravação pelos atalhos, no Siri, no widget, ações rápidas do 3D Touch ou pelo esquema do URL.
• Tempo de gravação ilimitado.
• Grave discretamente em segundo plano.
• Grave com o microfone interno, com AirPods ou microfones externos.
• Grave independente no Apple Watch e sincronize depois.

TOQUE
• Procure para trás e à frente na reprodução.
• Velocidade de reprodução ajustável.

TRANSCREVA
• Transforme voz em texto para pesquisa.
• Compatível com 30+ idiomas em qualquer configuração de idioma do aparelho.
• Destaque de texto e reprodução de áudio sincronizados.
• Formate enquanto grava com comandos de pontuação.

EDITE
• Áudio - veja o áudio no formato de forma de onda e corte as partes de que não precisa.
• Texto - faça correções e adicione novos textos às transcrições.

COMPARTILHE
• Compartilhe áudio e texto com outros aplicativos.
• Compartilhe em redes sociais como trecho de vídeo.
• Compartilhe no iTunes, no Mac ou no PC via cabo USB.
• Imprima uma cópia das suas transcrições.
• Compartilhe arquivos de áudio de outros aplicativos com o Just Press Record. 

ORGANIZE
• Consulte gravações recentes ou da biblioteca por data e horário.
• Pesquise por nome de arquivo ou transcrição.
• Guia dedicada ao acesso rápido às gravações do Apple Watch.
• Renomeie gravações.
• Compatível com Slide Over e Split View no iPad.
• Adicione selo ao ícone do aplicativo com número de gravações não reproduzidas.

ARMAZENAMENTO
• Armazene as gravações no iCloud Drive ou no dispositivo local.
• Gravações armazenadas no iCloud Drive são sincronizadas entre dispositivos.
• As gravações armazenadas no local se beneficiam da integração do aplicativo de arquivos e do compartilhamento automático de arquivos do iTunes.
• Transcrições são armazenadas no arquivo de áudio.

ÁUDIO PRO
• Compatível com gravação estéreo a partir do microfone interno de dispositivos compatíveis.
• Compatível com microfones externos de alta qualidade pela porta Lightning.
• Configurações ajustáveis para otimizar a experiência de áudio.
• Tipos de arquivo: WAV, AIF ou iTunes M4A padrão (ACC).
• Áudio de alta qualidade, até 96 kHz/24 bits.

ACESSIBILIDADE
• Compatível com VoiceOver no aplicativo.
• Gesto Magic Tap para iniciar/interromper gravação.

APPLE WATCH
Just Press Record conta com aplicativo para Apple Watch que permite gravar em qualquer lugar, mesmo sem o iPhone disponível.

• Comece a gravar com um único toque na Complicação.
• Grave discretamente em segundo plano.
• Tempo de gravação ilimitado.
• Gravações transferidas automaticamente para iPhone para transcr/sinc no iCloud.
• Ouça as gravações recentes no alto-falante interno ou nos AirPods.
• Ajuste o volume com a Digital Crown.
• Pause a gravação deslizando para baixo.
• Recursos de acessibilidade com VoiceOver, movimento reduzido, compatibilidade com modelo extra grande de Complicação.

IMPORTANTE:
• O Just Press Record não grava chamadas telefônicas ou áudio de outros aplicativos.
• A transcrição exibe um sinal de áudio bom e claro.  Evite gravar em ambientes ruidosos e posicione o microfone próximo à fonte de som.
• Esquema de URL implementado pelo Just Press Record está na página de FAQ.
